scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:web & npm run dev:cli
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/agent-core && npm run build --workspace=apps/cli && npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/channel-telegram
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/agent-core && npm run test --workspace=apps/cli && npm run test --workspace=apps/channel-telegram
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/agent-core && npm run lint --workspace=apps/cli && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web && npm run lint --workspace=apps/channel-telegram
